ddls:
CREATE TABLE "documents" (
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "text" TEXT /* Text content of the document */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., article, review, social media post) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the document (e.g., website, publication, social media platform) */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the document */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date the document was published */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the document */,
  "word_count" INTEGER /* Number of words in the document */,
  "is_archived" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the document is archived */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document being rated */,
  "rating1" INTEGER /* Rating on a scale of 1-5 for sentiment criterion 1 */,
  "rating2" INTEGER /* Rating on a scale of 1-5 for sentiment criterion 2 */,
  "rating3" INTEGER /* Rating on a scale of 1-5 for sentiment criterion 3 */,
  "rating_scale" TEXT /* Scale used for rating (e.g., 1-5, -2 to 2) */,
  "rating_type" TEXT /* Type of rating (manual or automatic) */,
  "algorithm_version" TEXT /* Version of the algorithm used for automatic ratings */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the automatic rating (if applicable) */,
  "rating_comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes provided by the user during manual rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_rating_scale FOREIGN KEY ("rating_scale") REFERENCES rating_scales ("scale_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "rating_scales" (
  "scale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating scale */,
  "scale_name" TEXT /* Name of the rating scale (e.g., 1-5, -2 to 2) */,
  "min_value" INTEGER /* Minimum value of the rating scale */,
  "max_value" INTEGER /* Maximum value of the rating scale */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the rating scale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scale_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, rater, analyst) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* User's first name */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* User's last name */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* User's phone number */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, suspended, deleted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_ratings" (
  "user_rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user rating */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the rating */,
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* ID of the rating being made */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was made */,
  "rating_comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes provided by the user during manual rating */,
  "is_reviewed" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the rating has been reviewed by a supervisor */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who reviewed the rating (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_ratings_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_ratings_rating_id FOREIGN KEY ("rating_id") REFERENCES ratings ("rating_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics record */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document being analyzed */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Sentiment score calculated based on ratings */,
  "tone_score" REAL /* Tone score calculated based on ratings */,
  "engagement_score" REAL /* Score indicating the level of engagement the document received */,
  "relevance_score" REAL /* Score indicating the relevance of the document to a specific topic */,
  "topic" TEXT /* Main topic or category of the document */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date and time the analytics were generated */,
  "algorithm_version" TEXT /* Version of the algorithm used for generating analytics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id")
)
